title: amaryllis striata var. fulgida
intro: Amaryllis striata var. fulgida, commonly known as the golden trumpet, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Amaryllis striata var. fulgida include its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve coughs and asthma symptoms. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
